title: Sci Fi Future City Poster AI
sourceTitle: Sci Fi Future City Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable science-fiction cinematic poster with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable science-fiction cinematic poster built around lone courier under mega-city bridge. signature elements: central futuristic warrior or subject, neon city energy, electric particles, dynamic diagonal motion, and event-poster typography layout logic: top title zone, central warrior, diagonal energy lines, city-depth background, and subtitle area should keep a game-event poster rhythm annotation system: poster title, subtitle, and game-event typography should be high impact, readable, and free of random extra slogans worldbuilding: rainy vertical neon city and cyan, violet, safety orange define the cinematic sci-fi atmosphere composition: stable composition, poster-first hierarchy, dominant hero image, secondary detail layers, and a clean title-ready area. style: High-energy cyberpunk esports poster style with neon blue-purple contrast, futuristic action subject, electric particles, and bold gaming-event typography. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: lone courier under mega-city bridge as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: rainy vertical neon city defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place color palette: controlled neon accents with deep cinematic contrast lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations. poster title: "LOW ORBIT" Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
imagePrompts.title: Lone Courier Under Mega City Bridge Rainy Vertic
